# Solid Phase Extraction

**Summary**: A sample preparation method used to separate and pre-concentrate analytes from a liquid mixture.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-mohammed|Mohammed, 2013]] applied solid-phase extraction (SPE) to process liquid samples for pesticide analysis.
